task1.title: The percentage of people unemployed in the total labour work force across 9 countries in 1994 and 2004
task1.instruction: The graph below shows the percentage of people unemployed in the total labour work force across 9 countries in 1994 and 2004. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features and make comparisons where relevant.

task2.instruction: More and more universities are replacing face-to-face teaching with online courses. Do you think this is a positive or negative development?
